name: Acolyte
description: You have spent your life in service to a temple.

name: Criminal
description: You have a history of breaking the law.

name: Folk Hero
description: You come from a humble social rank, destined for more.

name: Noble
description: You understand wealth, power, and privilege.

name: Sage
description: You spent years learning the lore of the multiverse.

name: Soldier
description: War has been your life for as long as you care to remember.

name: Entertainer
description: You thrive in front of an audience.

name: Hermit
description: You lived in seclusion, seeking enlightenment.
